docs.title: Payment Request MVP
docs.text:
Welcome to the documentation for the Utility Payment Request Platform.

This project aims to simplify how individuals and small service providers request payments by generating QR codes or payment links.

docs.title: Key Goals
docs.text:
• Remove the need to share bank details
  • Enable fast payments
  • Provide instant payment confirmation

docs.title: Documentation Sections
docs.text:
Product - Project idea - User flow

Technical - System architecture - API design

docs.title: Project Idea
docs.text:
A mobile-first payment request platform that allows individuals or small service providers to generate instant payment links or QR codes so customers can pay without sharing bank details.

Goal: Allow anyone to create a "Pay Me" request and get paid instantly.

docs.title: Target Users
docs.text:
Primary users include:

  • Freelancers
  • Small service providers
  • Side-hustle sellers
  • WhatsApp marketplace sellers

They need fast payments without repeatedly sharing banking details.

docs.title: Core Problem
docs.text:
Current payment process:

Customer asks to pay → Seller sends banking details → Customer performs EFT → Customer sends proof of payment → Seller manually checks bank

Problems:

  • Slow
  • Manual
  • Error-prone

Solution:

Generate a payment request → Customer scans QR or opens link → Payment confirmed automatically.

docs.title: First Feature (MVP)
docs.text:
Generate Payment Request.

User inputs: - Amount - Optional description

System generates: - QR code - Payment link
